Profiles.Name: admin-api
Profiles.Notes: Operator/control-plane HTTP API. Keep separate from long-running execution workers.

Profiles.Name: operator-ui
Profiles.Notes: UI should call the admin/control-plane API rather than directly touching operational SQL.

Profiles.Name: queue-worker
Profiles.Notes: Long-running migration execution process. Scale and deploy independently from operator surfaces.

Profiles.Name: scheduler-dispatcher
Profiles.Notes: Converts durable SQL run state into executable queue work. Keep concurrency conservative.

Profiles.Name: manifest-ingestion
Profiles.Notes: Ingests CSV/Excel/import artifacts into SQL-first operational manifest tables.
